title: 2025年度 第2回検定一次試験 英検4級 リスニング

parts.name: 第1部
parts.description: イラストを参考にしながら対話を聞き、その最後の文に対する応答として最も適切なものを選ぶ形式です。選択肢は音声で放送されます。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What are you reading, Bob?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: It's a ski magazine.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Really? Can I read it after you finish?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「読み終わったら読んでいい？」に2の「もちろん、いいよ」が適切。
highlights: Can I read it after you finish
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「僕も」→不自然。2「もちろん、いいよ」→正解。3「はい、します」→不自然。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Grandma.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi, James. How was school?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I got a good grade on my math test.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「数学のテストで良い成績だった」に2の「素晴らしい」が適切。
highlights: I got a good grade on my math test
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「明日」→無関係。2「素晴らしい」→正解。3「忙しい」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you enjoy the zoo?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. I love animals.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What did you like the best?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何が一番好きだった？」に1の「ペンギン」が適切。
highlights: What did you like the best
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ペンギン」→正解。2「雨だった」→好きなものの答えでない。3「両親と」→誰とではなく何が好きか。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi, Bill.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Hi, Sarah. Do you want to study today?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sounds good.

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「今日勉強する？」「いいね」に2の「放課後に会おう」が適切。
highlights: Do you want to study today
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「どうぞ」→文脈に合わない。2「放課後に会おう」→正解。3「机の上にある」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Are you open on Sundays?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes, but not all day.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Will you be open in the evening?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「夕方は開いてますか？」に1の「いいえ、3時に閉めます」が適切。
highlights: Will you be open in the evening
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「3時に閉めます」→正解。2「セール中」→無関係。3「まだあります」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How often do you go to the gym?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Twice a week.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: When do you go?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「いつ行くの？」に3の「夕食前」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ジョギングが好き」→時間の答えでない。2「約1時間」→いつかでなく長さ。3「夕食前」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mom, I saw a snake in the garden.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Do you like snakes?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「ヘビ好き？」に2の「いいえ、あまり」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「部屋を掃除していた」→無関係。2「あまり好きじゃない」→正解。3「ペットショップで」→無関係。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Mommy! Daddy won't play with me.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: He's tired, Tommy.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Why?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「なぜ？」に1の「昨日仕事をしたから」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「昨日仕事をしたから」→正解。2「テニスしない」→無関係。3「通りの向こう」→無関係。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Hi, Daniel. Where's your father?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: He went to the store, Mom.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: When will he come home?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「いつ帰ってくる？」に2の「6時半頃」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「野菜を買いに」→いつかでなく何のため。2「6時半頃」→正解。3「台所に」→場所。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I went hiking last weekend.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That's nice.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What did you do?

questions.question: What is the best response?
questions.explanation: 「何をしたの？」に2の「祖父母を訪ねた」が適切。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「見つけた」→何をしたかの答えとして不十分。2「祖父母を訪ねた」→正解。3「自転車で来た」→手段。

parts.name: 第2部
parts.description: 対話を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What's our next class, Gina?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: History.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Oh, that's right.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: We have math after lunch.

questions.question: Which class do they have next?
questions.explanation: 「次の授業は？」「歴史」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「歴史」→正解。2「数学」→昼食後。3「英語」→言及なし。4「理科」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can you ski?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Yes. I learned last winter. How about you?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My father will teach me this weekend.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Great. Let's go skiing together next month.

questions.question: When will the girl learn to ski?
questions.explanation: 「今週末に父が教えてくれる」。
highlights: My father will teach me this weekend
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「明日」→今週末。2「今週末」→正解。3「来月」→一緒にスキー。4「来年の冬」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Did you bring my book?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Sorry. I left it in my bedroom.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: That's OK. Did you finish reading it?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Yes. It was great.

questions.question: What are they talking about?
questions.explanation: 「僕の本持ってきた？」と本について話している。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「好きな映画」→本の話。2「男の子の本」→正解。3「女の子の寝室」→本を忘れた場所。4「図書館」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Ted, when will you leave for Europe?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Tomorrow. I'll stay in France for one week and Spain for five days.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Have fun.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Thanks. See you next month.

questions.question: How long will Ted stay in Spain?
questions.explanation: 「スペインに5日間」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1日」→5日。2「5日」→正解。3「1週間」→フランス。4「5週間」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How's your new school?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: My teachers are nice, and the gym is new.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: What do you like the best?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: The cafeteria. It's big.

questions.question: What does the girl like the best about her new school?
questions.explanation: 「カフェテリアが一番好き」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「カフェテリア」→正解。2「体育館」→新しいが一番ではない。3「先生」→良いが一番ではない。4「友達」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Can you help me with the math homework?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Sorry, I'm doing my science homework.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I'll ask the teacher for help.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK.

questions.question: What does the girl need help with?
questions.explanation: 「数学の宿題を手伝って」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「理科」→男の子がやっている。2「英語」→言及なし。3「歴史」→言及なし。4「数学」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Dad, what's for lunch?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: We can have sandwiches or noodles.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I had toast for breakfast. I don't want sandwiches.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: OK, we'll have noodles.

questions.question: What did the girl have for breakfast?
questions.explanation: 「朝食にトーストを食べた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「サンドイッチ」→嫌がっている。2「トースト」→正解。3「スープ」→言及なし。4「ヌードル」→昼食。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Is the class trip next month?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No. It's next Friday.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: What time will it start?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: At 9:00 a.m. We'll go to the zoo.

questions.question: When is the class trip?
questions.explanation: 「来週の金曜日」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「来週の金曜」→正解。2「来週の土曜」→金曜。3「来月」→否定された。4「来週の日曜」→金曜。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I bought you a present.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Thank you, Oliver! Are they socks?

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: No. I bought black gloves for you.

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: How nice!

questions.question: What did Oliver buy for the woman?
questions.explanation: 「黒い手袋を買った」。
highlights: I bought black gloves for you
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「靴」→言及なし。2「パンツ」→言及なし。3「靴下」→否定された。4「手袋」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Excuse me, where is the nearest station?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: There's one at the end of this street.

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: How long does it take to walk there?

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: It takes five minutes to walk there.

questions.question: How long does it take to walk to the station?
questions.explanation: 「歩いて5分」。

parts.name: 第3部
parts.description: 英文を聞き、その質問に対して最も適切な答えを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選ぶ形式です。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Last Saturday was my wife's birthday, so we went to a nice restaurant. We had steak, and we ate cake, too. We had a very good time.

questions.question: What did the man and his wife do last Saturday?
questions.explanation: 「素敵なレストランに行った」。
highlights: we went to a nice restaurant
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ケーキを作った」→食べた。2「プレゼントを探した」→言及なし。3「レストランに行った」→正解。4「ステーキを料理した」→食べた。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Jack gave Sally four apples. She ate one and gave the other three to her brother. He loves apples, so he ate all of them.

questions.question: How many apples did Jack give to Sally?
questions.explanation: 「ジャックはサリーにリンゴを4つあげた」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「1つ」→食べた数。2「2つ」→4つ。3「3つ」→兄弟にあげた数。4「4つ」→正解。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: On Sunday mornings, I take a walk in the park near my house. Then, I read the newspaper in a coffee shop near the station.

questions.question: Where does the man read the newspaper?
questions.explanation: 「駅の近くのコーヒーショップで新聞を読む」。
highlights: I read the newspaper in a coffee shop
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「コーヒーショップ」→正解。2「公園」→散歩する場所。3「家」→言及なし。4「駅」→コーヒーショップの近く。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Everyone in my class is writing reports about different animals. Tom is writing about ducks, and Steve is writing about hamsters. I'm writing about pandas.

questions.question: Which animal is Tom writing his report about?
questions.explanation: 「トムはアヒルについて書いている」。
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「ハムスター」→スティーブ。2「アヒル」→正解。3「パンダ」→話者。4「ウサギ」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: My birthday is next week. Last year, I went to a baseball game on my birthday. This year, I want to watch a musical.

questions.question: What does the boy want to do on his birthday this year?
questions.explanation: 「今年はミュージカルを見たい」。
highlights: I want to watch a musical
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「野球をする」→観戦した（去年）。2「野球観戦」→去年。3「ミュージカルを見る」→正解。4「ピアノを弾く」→言及なし。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I asked my brother for help with my math homework. But he had baseball practice. My sister was practicing the piano, so I asked my mother for help.

questions.question: Who was practicing the piano?
questions.explanation: 「姉/妹がピアノの練習をしていた」。
highlights: My sister was practicing the piano
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「女の子」→宿題をしている。2「兄弟」→野球の練習。3「姉妹」→正解。4「母」→手伝った。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: Alice loves to read after she finishes her homework. She can read one book in three hours. She reads two books every week.

questions.question: How many books does Alice read every week?
questions.explanation: 「毎週2冊読む」。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: Olivia will go to a concert at five o'clock. She will leave her house at three o'clock and take the train to the concert hall. She will arrive there at 4:30.

questions.question: When will Olivia leave her house?
questions.explanation: 「3時に家を出る」。
highlights: leave her house at three o'clock
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「3時」→正解。2「3時半」→言及なし。3「4時半」→到着時間。4「5時」→コンサートの時間。

lines.speaker: male
lines.text: I visited my uncle's house yesterday. It snowed a lot, so I couldn't ride my bike, take a bus, or take a taxi. I had to walk to his house.

questions.question: How did the boy go to his uncle's house?
questions.explanation: 「歩いて行くしかなかった」。
highlights: I had to walk to his house
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「自転車」→できなかった。2「バス」→できなかった。3「タクシー」→できなかった。4「徒歩」→正解。

lines.speaker: female
lines.text: I love singing songs. I want to be a singer in the future, so I decided to join a music school next month.

questions.question: What will the girl do next month?
questions.explanation: 「来月音楽学校に入ることにした」。
highlights: join a music school next month
questions.choiceAnalysis: 1「曲を作る」→歌うのが好き。2「音楽学校に入る」→正解。3「歌手に会う」→歌手になりたい。4「コンサートに行く」→言及なし。
